description: Popular BG3SE mods for compatibility testing. Priority: P0 (gate), P1 (high), P2 (standard), P3 (edge case). Tier 1 mods should be vetted first.

mcm.name: Mod Configuration Menu
mcm.author: Volitio
mcm.notes: THE gate mod. 500+ mods depend on it. 18K lines Lua, AGPL-3.0.

community_library.name: Community Library
community_library.author: NellsRelo
community_library.notes: Shared utilities and compatibility framework. Dependency for hundreds of mods.

5e_spells.name: 5e Spells
5e_spells.author: Celes
5e_spells.notes: Most endorsed SE spell mod. Tests Stats, functors, StaticData.

expansion_lvl20.name: Expansion - Level 20
expansion_lvl20.author: nitram166
expansion_lvl20.notes: Major gameplay mod — levels 13-20, spells 7-9. Tests Stats, progression, StaticData.

more_reactive_companions.name: More Reactive Companions
more_reactive_companions.author: LightningLarryL
more_reactive_companions.notes: Already confirmed working on v0.36.17. Re-verify on latest.

combat_extender.name: Combat Extender
combat_extender.author: DarknessSilverTower
combat_extender.notes: Most popular gameplay mod. Stress-tests Stats + MCM.

party_limit_begone.name: Party Limit Begone
party_limit_begone.author: SildurFX
party_limit_begone.notes: Party limit to 16, multiplayer to 8. Tests entity manipulation.

auto_send_food.name: Auto Send Food To Camp
auto_send_food.notes: Simple MCM smoke test — minimal API surface.

always_show_approvals.name: Always Show Approvals
always_show_approvals.notes: Tests UI hooks and Events system.

configurable_enemies.name: Configurable Enemies
configurable_enemies.notes: Stress-tests Stats mutation under MCM control.

spell_points_5e.name: Spell Points 5e
spell_points_5e.notes: SE plugin, tests StaticData and Stats interaction.

improved_ui.name: ImprovedUI
improved_ui.author: Djmr
improved_ui.notes: Pure UI XML mod — no SE APIs. Tests clean load (negative control).

bg3_mod_fixer.name: BG3 Mod Fixer
bg3_mod_fixer.author: figs999
bg3_mod_fixer.notes: Story recompile — unnecessary on Patch 7+. Negative test.
